category_sources: source_facts.description states Preprocessor and pretty-printer for OCaml; official documentation describes Camlp5 as a preprocessor and pretty-printer for OCaml programs.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses Camlp5 capitalization; source_facts.name is camlp5.
docs_sources: Official Camlp5 GitHub Pages documentation is hosted at camlp5.github.io/doc/html/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCaml preprocessing and pretty-printing; official docs cover parsing tools, printing tools, and syntax extensions.
